targeted_verifications.description: Teams view crashes with React hooks error on navigation from Settings to Teams
evidence: Settings -> Teams: Teams view loaded without crash, rooms list and room detail fully rendered
Memory -> Teams: No crash, rooms and chat visible
Settings -> Teams -> Settings -> Teams (rapid cycling): No crash on any transition
Total of 7 cross-tab navigations to Teams view with zero hooks errors
Console shows only 2 errors throughout entire session: nested button hydration warning and favicon 404 — no hooks errors whatsoever

targeted_verifications.description: Session launcher respects default model from Settings
evidence: Settings page shows Default Model with 'opus' selected
Session launcher (Cmd+N) model dropdown defaults to 'opus' (option 'opus' [selected])
Bottom of launcher dialog shows 'opus (default)' confirming it reads from Settings
Both initial dialog open and re-open after close use the configured default

regression_checks.description: Cost tracking per session and total
regression_checks.notes: Top bar shows $137.3. Running on Machine: $119.9 (opus 4h 26m) + $17.4 (opus 1h 17m). Sum = $137.3.

regression_checks.description: Session distinguishing info in Running on Machine
regression_checks.notes: Sessions show model (opus), uptime (4h 26m, 1h 17m), and per-session cost. Distinguishable.
Sonnet test room shows 'All agents are offline. Start room to launch sessions (uses API credits).' with Start Room button.
New Sprint button present in Sprints tab.
Clicking Close room shows dialog: 'Close room?' / 'Active conversations will end.' / Cancel / Close. Cancel dismisses without closing room.
No sun/moon toggle anywhere. App consistently dark.
Shows 'API: Off-Peak' with tooltip explaining Anthropic API rate limits and peak window (20:00-02:00 local).
'22% | 23.6/24GB' with tooltip showing System Resources, CPU %, Memory details.
Cmd+N opens session launcher, Cmd+K opens command palette. Both work correctly.
Sprint 'Code Quality + Security Cleanup' (Waiting) shows Pause and Cancel buttons.
$119.9 and $17.4 visible per session in Running on Machine.
Not re-verified in this run (verified in run 4, no code changes since).

details: Nested <button> inside <button> hydration warning in RoomItem component (pre-existing DOM nesting issue, not a crash)

identity_compliance.amber_accent: pass - active tab and interactive elements use amber
identity_compliance.no_emoji_in_ui: pass - no emoji in UI chrome

overall_assessment: TASK-38 (HIGH - React hooks crash) fully verified fixed. 7 navigation cycles to Teams with zero hooks errors. TASK-17 (MEDIUM - session launcher default model) verified — launcher correctly defaults to 'opus' matching Settings. All 13 previously verified fixes remain stable (no regressions). No new bugs found. Health score improves.
